com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto

Description

  • Uses of ShipmentDto in com.wip.controller

    Methods in com.wip.controller that return types with arguments of type ShipmentDto
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ShipmentDto>
    ShipmentController.addShipment(Long parcelid)
    Creates a new shipment for an existing parcel.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ShipmentDto>>
    ShipmentController.getAllShipments()
    Retrieves a list of all shipments currently registered in the system.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ShipmentDto>
    ShipmentController.getShipmentById(Long id)
    Retrieves the details of a single shipment identified by its unique ID.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ShipmentDto>
    ShipmentController.getShipmentByTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
    Retrieves a shipment using its unique tracking number.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ShipmentDto>
    ShipmentController.updateShipmentLocation(Long id, String currentLocation)
    Updates the current geographic location of a shipment in transit.
    Methods in com.wip.controller with parameters of type ShipmentDto
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    ShipmentUiController.saveShipment(ShipmentDto shipmentDto, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
    Processes the submission of the new shipment creation form and initiates the shipment.
    String
    ShipmentUiController.updateShipment(Long id, @Valid ShipmentDto shipmentDto, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Processes the submission of the shipment edit form and persists the updated details.

    Retrieves a shipment by its tracking number.

    Updates shipment details such as dates and location.

    Updates the shipment dates and current location.

    Updates the current location of a shipment.
    ShipmentDto
